scripts.honesty-audit: if grep -riE 'trusted by|fortune 500|industry-leading|world-class|best-in-class|cutting-edge|revolutionary|game-changing|unparalleled|enterprise-grade' src/ ; then echo '\nHonesty audit FAILED — see hits above. See CONTENT-08 + Pitfall 4 in 02-RESEARCH.md.' && exit 1 ; else echo 'Honesty audit PASSED.' ; fi
